Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. Reviewing Large Changes with Jujutsu 80 upvotes, 9 comments
  2. Human Organ Atlas 24 upvotes, 1 comments
  3. Bringing Semiconductors to Kazakhstan 32 upvotes, 4 comments
  4. Canada's bill C-22 mandates mass metadata surveillance 937 upvotes, 295 comments
  5. My Journey to a reliable and enjoyable locally hosted voice assistant 153 upvotes, 44 comments
  6. MoD sources warn Palantir role at heart of government is threat to UK security 407 upvotes, 143 comments
  7. Six ingenious ways how Canon DSLRs used to illuminate their autofocus points 109 upvotes, 33 comments
  8. Stop Sloppypasta 571 upvotes, 224 comments
  9. Chrome DevTools MCP (2025) 556 upvotes, 220 comments
  10. The 49MB web page 741 upvotes, 324 comments
  11. I Love FreeBSD 172 upvotes, 65 comments
  12. Corruption erodes social trust more in democracies than in autocracies 498 upvotes, 222 comments
  13. Comparing Python Type Checkers: Typing Spec Conformance 55 upvotes, 17 comments
  14. Event Publisher enables event integration between Keycloak and OpenFGA 11 upvotes, 1 comments
  15. Lazycut: A simple terminal video trimmer using FFmpeg 73 upvotes, 26 comments
  16. Home Assistant waters my plants 184 upvotes, 81 comments
  17. Autoresearch Hub 60 upvotes, 24 comments
  18. Polymarket gamblers threaten to kill me over Iran missile story 836 upvotes, 508 comments
  19. Even Faster Asin() Was Staring Right at Me 61 upvotes, 30 comments
  20. 'Pokémon Go' players unknowingly trained delivery robots with 30B images 101 upvotes, 56 comments
  21. On The Need For Understanding 8 upvotes, 1 comments
  22. Obsession with growth is destroying nature, 150 countries warn 212 upvotes, 144 comments
  23. Launch HN: Voygr (YC W26) – A better maps API for agents and AI apps 19 upvotes, 8 comments
  24. Show HN: Hackerbrief – Top posts on Hacker News summarized daily 51 upvotes, 36 comments
  25. US Job Market Visualizer – Andrej Karpathy 170 upvotes, 148 comments
  26. How I write software with LLMs 410 upvotes, 388 comments
  27. Cert Authorities Check for DNSSEC from Today 28 upvotes, 19 comments
  28. Launch HN: Chamber (YC W26) – An AI Teammate for GPU Infrastructure 2 upvotes, 0 comments
  29. The bureaucracy blocking the chance at a cure 22 upvotes, 33 comments
  30. Kaizen (YC P25) Hiring Eng, GTM, Cos to Automate BPOs 0 upvotes, 0 comments
